description: Composition Black round neck short sleeved T-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has a softly ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, brand logo embroidered below the nape of the neck and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in cool water at 30 degrees Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean The puma Cover T-shirt has a casual style and a great look. Enjoy the lightness and comfort as you try it on. The puma cat graphic on the T-shirt will remind you of its lineage. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulder-18"
